overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic urban environment (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning at a sunny outdoor terrace with palm trees and a neon-lit bar, then walking through covered commercial plazas with distinctive lattice roofing, and finally transitioning into a dark, neon-lit corridor. The scene features modern architecture, digital billboards, parked vehicles, and scattered NPC pedestrians.

two people conversing at round table

entered.detail: white curved structure with blue neon lighting and glass display cases
tall palm trees lining the terrace edge against the skyline
round tables with high stools where NPCs are seated
futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a bright, sunny outdoor terrace with palm trees and a distinctive futuristic bar kiosk featuring blue neon accents. Several NPCs are seated at high tables enjoying the atmosphere, while the camera moves steadily forward past them toward a covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated covered walkway overlooking lower plaza

events.description: moves from open terrace into covered walkway under concrete overhang

agents.ego_description: walking along covered walkway with metal railing overlooking a lower plaza area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: white metal safety railing along the walkway edge
large concrete structure providing partial shade overhead
sunken plaza area with palm trees visible below the walkway
curved glass facade building with reflective windows

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions into a semi-covered walkway with metal railings, offering views of a lower palm-tree-lined plaza. The concrete overhang creates dappled lighting as the path curves toward a large commercial plaza entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: large covered commercial plaza with lattice roof structure

events.description: enters large covered plaza with distinctive curved lattice roof structure
lighting shifts from natural sunlight to mixed artificial under the lattice roof

agents.ego_description: walking through busy plaza passing various pedestrians and digital advertising displays

notable_agents.action: woman in green shorts walking across the plaza
man in white jacket walking briskly past the camera

entered.detail: dramatic curved wooden or metal lattice work forming the plaza ceiling with integrated lighting
tall rectangular pillars displaying colorful digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: Entering a vast covered plaza with a dramatic curved lattice roof overhead, the scene fills with scattered pedestrians and towering digital advertising pillars. The lighting becomes noticeably softer and more artificial, with the intricate roof structure casting geometric shadows across the tiled floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with vehicle displays and large digital billboards

events.description: passes by row of parked vintage cars along the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing through plaza past parked vehicles and large advertising displays

notable_agents.action: person in beige outfit standing near a parked vintage car

entered.detail: tall vertical billboard displaying an advertisement with a moon or planet image
row of classic and vintage vehicles parked along the plaza edge
low concrete and metal barriers separating pedestrian path from parking area
painted orange line marking the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the covered plaza, passing a row of parked vintage cars and large digital billboards mounted on pillars. An orange path marking guides the way as the camera moves deeper into the commercial complex, with the lattice roof still visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark covered walkway between modern buildings with neon lighting

events.description: enters significantly darker corridor with artificial neon lighting only
transitions from open plaza to enclosed walkway between tall buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit corridor with neon accents and glass building facades

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench in the shadows near the building wall

entered.detail: tall building with dark reflective glass windows and green neon accent lighting
large structural columns supporting the overhead walkway or building
green and purple neon lighting illuminating the dark corridor

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a dark, enclosed walkway between modern glass buildings, illuminated only by artificial neon lights in green and purple hues. The atmosphere shifts dramatically from the bright open plaza to a shadowy urban corridor, with the camera moving steadily forward into the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sun-drenched outdoor terrace into a dark, neon-lit urban corridor. It begins by gliding past palm trees and a blue-accented bar kiosk where NPCs are seated, moving steadily forward toward a covered walkway. As the camera transitions under a concrete overhang, the lighting becomes dappled before the scene opens into a vast commercial plaza defined by a dramatic curved lattice roof and towering digital advertising pillars. The path then continues past parked vintage cars and glowing billboards, guided by an orange floor marking that leads deeper into the complex. Finally, the environment shifts dramatically as the camera leaves the open plaza to enter a shadowy, enclosed walkway between glass buildings, illuminated only by artificial green and purple neon lights.
